jobs_pay_nonneg_chk.name: jobs_pay_nonneg_chk
jobs_pay_nonneg_chk.value: ("jobs"."pay_min" IS NULL OR "jobs"."pay_min" >= 0) AND ("jobs"."pay_max" IS NULL OR "jobs"."pay_max" >= 0)

jobs_pay_order_chk.name: jobs_pay_order_chk
jobs_pay_order_chk.value: "jobs"."pay_min" IS NULL OR "jobs"."pay_max" IS NULL OR "jobs"."pay_max" >= "jobs"."pay_min"

jobs_experience_nonneg_chk.name: jobs_experience_nonneg_chk
jobs_experience_nonneg_chk.value: ("jobs"."min_experience_years" IS NULL OR "jobs"."min_experience_years" >= 0) AND ("jobs"."max_experience_years" IS NULL OR "jobs"."max_experience_years" >= 0)

jobs_experience_order_chk.name: jobs_experience_order_chk
jobs_experience_order_chk.value: "jobs"."min_experience_years" IS NULL OR "jobs"."max_experience_years" IS NULL OR "jobs"."max_experience_years" >= "jobs"."min_experience_years"

worker_answers_one_value_chk.name: worker_answers_one_value_chk
worker_answers_one_value_chk.value:
(
        ("worker_answers"."answer_text" IS NOT NULL)::int +
        ("worker_answers"."answer_number" IS NOT NULL)::int +
        ("worker_answers"."answer_date" IS NOT NULL)::int
      ) = 1
